hero.subtitle: Manage your fleet, connect with drivers, find loads, post classifieds, and grow your transport business — all in one place.

sections.heading: Everything your transport business needs
sections.subheading: One platform, all the tools. Built specifically for the African road transport industry.

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.description: Track your entire truck fleet, schedule maintenance, and manage vehicle hirings from one dashboard.

drivers.title: Driver Profiles
drivers.description: Manage driver certifications, trip history, and availability. Find qualified drivers instantly.

loads.title: Available Loads
loads.description: Browse freight loads, submit quotes, and win contracts. Real-time load board with instant notifications.

jobs.title: Jobs Board
jobs.description: Post driver job offers or find your next opportunity. Connects employers and professional drivers.

classifieds.title: Classifieds
classifieds.description: Buy and sell trucks, trailers, and equipment. Verified listings with secure contact options.

forum.title: Industry Forum
forum.description: Connect with fellow transporters, share knowledge, and discuss what matters to the industry.

blog.heading: Latest Industry Insights
blog.subheading: Tips, guides, and news from the transport world
